label: short
chain_of_thought:
Okay

Let's compute each of these floor functions.

First, I'll compute 1000/7
1000/7 = 142.857...
So ⌊1000/7⌋ = 142

Second, I'll compute 1000/11
1000/11 = 90.909...
So ⌊1000/11⌋ = 90

Third, I'll compute 1000/13
1000/13 = 76.923...
So ⌊1000/13⌋ = 76

Now I'll add them up:
142 + 90 + 76 = 308

So the answer is 308.
